overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The camera moves steadily along a narrow dirt path flanked by dense vegetation and a large rock formation, with the visual style suggesting rendered game engine footage from a survival or exploration game.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow forest trail at night. Dense vegetation lines both sides of the dirt path, and a large rock formation gradually becomes visible on the left as the camera advances. The scene is illuminated by a focused light source, creating deep shadows in the surrounding woods.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward along the forest trail with the large rock formation now prominent on the left. A wooden fence or structure briefly appears on the right side among the trees before passing out of view. The path remains narrow and enclosed by dense vegetation as the journey continues deeper into the dark woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic forest trail that gradually reveals larger environmental landmarks amidst the darkness. It begins with a steady advance along a narrow dirt path, where a focused light source cuts through the night to illuminate dense vegetation and deep shadows. As the camera moves forward, a massive rock formation slowly emerges and becomes a prominent fixture on the left side of the trail. The scene then shifts slightly as a wooden fence briefly appears among the trees on the right before vanishing from view. Finally, the camera continues its push deeper into the dark woods, maintaining its course through the enclosed greenery.
